title: capsicum molle
intro: Capsicum molle, also known as the Chilean pepper tree or the mountain pepper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Capsicum molle include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Capsicum molle include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
